Name: KEY_CONFIG_PARAM
Description: Defines the game's input binding configuration, mapping player actions (movement, camera control, combat, menu navigation, and system actions) to control inputs, including primary and secondary (additional) bindings.

Fields.Name: Move Forward
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the player character forward.

Fields.Name: Move Forward (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input binding for moving the player character forward.

Fields.Name: Move Backward
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the player character backward.

Fields.Name: Move Backward (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input binding for moving the player character backward.

Fields.Name: Move Right
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the player character to the right.

Fields.Name: Move Right (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input binding for moving the player character to the right.

Fields.Name: Move Left
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the player character to the left.

Fields.Name: Move Left (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input binding for moving the player character to the left.

Fields.Name: Walk (Strafe/Parallel Move)
Fields.Description: Input for switching to or performing controlled parallel movement mode.

Fields.Name: Dash / Sprint
Fields.Description: Input for initiating a fast movement dash or sprint action.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Up
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the camera upward.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Up (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input for moving the camera upward.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Down
Fields.Description: Primary input for moving the camera downward.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Down (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input for moving the camera downward.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Right
Fields.Description: Primary input for rotating/moving the camera to the right.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Right (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input for camera right movement.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Left
Fields.Description: Primary input for rotating/moving the camera to the left.

Fields.Name: Camera Move Left (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary input for camera left movement.

Fields.Name: Lock-On / Reset Camera
Fields.Description: Toggles target lock-on or resets camera depending on context.

Fields.Name: Lock-On / Reset Camera (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for lock-on or camera reset.

Fields.Name: Switch Magic
Fields.Description: Cycles or changes selected magic/spells.

Fields.Name: Switch Magic (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for switching magic.

Fields.Name: Switch Item
Fields.Description: Cycles or changes selected consumable item.

Fields.Name: Switch Item (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for switching items.

Fields.Name: Switch Right Weapon
Fields.Description: Changes the equipped right-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Switch Right Weapon (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for right-hand weapon switching.

Fields.Name: Switch Left Weapon
Fields.Description: Changes the equipped left-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Switch Left Weapon (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for left-hand weapon switching.

Fields.Name: Right Hand Weak Attack
Fields.Description: Performs a light attack using the right-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Right Hand Weak Attack (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for right-hand light attack.

Fields.Name: Right Hand Strong Attack
Fields.Description: Performs a heavy attack using the right-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Right Hand Strong Attack (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for right-hand heavy attack.

Fields.Name: Left Hand Weak Attack
Fields.Description: Performs a light attack using the left-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Left Hand Weak Attack (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for left-hand light attack.

Fields.Name: Left Hand Strong Attack
Fields.Description: Performs a heavy attack using the left-hand weapon.

Fields.Name: Left Hand Strong Attack (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for left-hand heavy attack.

Fields.Name: Use Item
Fields.Description: Uses the currently selected item.

Fields.Name: Use Item (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for item usage.

Fields.Name: Context Action
Fields.Description: Performs context-sensitive interaction actions such as examining or interacting.

Fields.Name: Context Action (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for context actions.

Fields.Name: Two-Hand Weapon Toggle
Fields.Description: Switches right-hand weapon to two-handed use or back.

Fields.Name: Two-Hand Weapon Toggle (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for two-hand weapon toggle.

Fields.Name: Open Menu
Fields.Description: Opens the main system/menu interface.

Fields.Name: Open Menu (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for opening the menu.

Fields.Name: Navigate Up
Fields.Description: Moves selection cursor upward in menus.

Fields.Name: Navigate Up (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for menu upward navigation.

Fields.Name: Navigate Down
Fields.Description: Moves selection cursor downward in menus.

Fields.Name: Navigate Down (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for menu downward navigation.

Fields.Name: Navigate Right
Fields.Description: Moves selection cursor to the right in menus.

Fields.Name: Navigate Right (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for menu right navigation.

Fields.Name: Navigate Left
Fields.Description: Moves selection cursor to the left in menus.

Fields.Name: Navigate Left (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary binding for menu left navigation.

Fields.Name: Confirm / Accept
Fields.Description: Confirms selection or activates selected menu option.

Fields.Name: Confirm (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary confirm input binding.

Fields.Name: Cancel / Back
Fields.Description: Cancels an action or returns to the previous menu.

Fields.Name: Cancel (Additional Input)
Fields.Description: Secondary cancel/back input binding.

Fields.Name: Unknown 58
Fields.Description: Unidentified input slot (likely reserved or unused).

Fields.Description: Unidentified input slot (likely reserved or unused).
